channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Water meter cover missing, 23rd July
item.description:
Water meter cover outside number 17 Hazeldene Road missing, leaving a large hole that a child or elderly person can fall in.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazeldene Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car with expired MOT and door hanging off., 23rd July
item.description:
This car has been parked on the road outside 26/28 Swingate Lane for about 2 weeks now. Its MOT has expired so is parked illegally, and as you can see from the picture, the door is hanging off, so it is clearly unroadworthy.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Swingate Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd July
item.description:
Ongoing fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large over hanging bush on Erith Road near Alberta Road junction, 23rd July
item.description:
The large overhanging vegetation at the junction of Alberta Road and Erith Road is obstructing the full view of oncoming traffic when turning out of Alberta Road. Vehicles often approach quickly up the hill, making it difficult to judge when it is safe to pull out. There have already been numerous accidents at this junction, and the vegetation should be cut back as a matter of urgency to improve visibility and road safety.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Courtleet Drive, Barnehurst, Erith, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 23rd July
item.description:
Our residential bin area is dumped in by passersby from market and bin bag flytipping all week in goid bin and recycling bin and overflowing and now when we went to put bins out for collection someone has emptied all the bin bags everywhere and bin men and street cleaners wont clear it Health and safety issues too with foxes rats mice glues in our gardens and homes We need long term solution as ongoing problem Signage? Gated? This bin area currently serves 3 households but is full and overflowing very week. And people miss there most nights on way past from borough market pubs and restaurants

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Park Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light out, 23rd July
item.description:
Street light outside 34/36 out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pembury Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain cover missing, 23rd July
item.description:
Drain cover is missing massive deep hole in role someone could fall down or animals trapped. Danger/hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32,32A, Maylands Drive, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yet More Fly Tipping Truman’s Road, 23rd July
item.description:
This must be the sixth consecutive day where I’ve had to report fly tipping. Even more’s now dumped either side of Truman’s Road, even beneath the signs discouraging it - it says there’s CCTV so please use it as it’s getting beyond ridiculous now.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salcombe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More flytipping, 23rd July
item.description:
Double mattress and other items left in Copperas Street SE8.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Little Thames Walk, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ongoing fly-tipping issue at the end of Fortune Walk, at the junction with Garrick Drive (SE28 0EL), 23rd July
item.description:
Several black rubbish bags and other waste have been left on the pavement at the end of Fortune Walk, at the junction with Garrick Drive (SE28 0EL). The waste has been there for some time and appears to have been fly-tipped, obstructing the footway. Please arrange for it to be removed. Attached is a photo showing the location.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fortune Walk, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 38-40 Allcroft Road, 23rd July
item.description:
Leaning tree with pole at angle. Needs securing and re staking.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Allcroft Road, Gospel Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The bin is missing from the derwent road bus stop (N), 23rd July
item.description:
The bin is missing from the derwent road bus stop (N) there used to be a bin at this bus stop, but theres no bin there now. the consequence of this is people leave trash lying around the bus stop and on the grass next to the bus stop. please replace the bin.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 169 - 175, Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous pothole outside 50 Avondale Road, 23rd July
item.description:
This pothole is getting extremely dangerous for the public. It has got deeper and pieces of the road have now come away as can be seen from the photo. These pieces of debris could have hit someone or a car! This pothole needs fixing asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avondale Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping on South End of Turquand Street (SE17), 23rd July
item.description:
Dumped household waste and materials are blocking the pavement directly under the Turquand Street SE17 street sign, right next to the green utility box. The pile consists of stripped carpet and underlay pieces, plastic tarpaulins, textiles, bags, cardboard boxes, and loose refuse. Please arrange for collection and clearance as it is obstructing the public footway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Browning Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking emergency access and garages, 23rd July
item.description:
4 cars cannot get and dangerous if a fire

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned household rubbish, 23rd July
item.description:
Abandoned household rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warburton Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Caravan on Highfield Road blocking the footbapth, 23rd July
item.description:
Caravan blocking public access to footpath

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Highfield Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the pavement outside of 13 Burton Road, 23rd July
item.description:
A large broken mirror; it’s shattered with sharp pieces on the ground

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Two big potholes, 23rd July
item.description:
Two big potholes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mitchell Way, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Too many limes. terrible lime bike parking. no space for anything. DANGEROUS. ban lime bikes until they are regulated properly, 23rd July
item.description:
It is not one bike, it is hundreds, parked badly on both sides of the road so there is no space for bikes and cars to get through. to exacerbate the problem, the lime bike maintenance has parked in the middle of the road to do his job. it’s not just this road but round the corner at the end of exton street, where bikes are frequently parked so dangerously. the issue is daily.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cornwall Road, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
